segments.text: How long, O LORD? Will you forget me forever? How long will you hide your face from me?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How long must I take counsel in my soul and have sorrow in my heart all the day? How long shall my enemy be exalted over me?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Look on me and answer, O LORD my God; light up my eyes, lest I sleep the sleep of death,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: lest my enemy say, 'I have prevailed over him,' lest my foes rejoice because I am shaken.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But I have trusted in your steadfast love; my heart shall rejoice in your salvation.
segments.speaker: David
